html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Lisa’s still facing ongoing stress and hormonal shifts, and that’s okay — these are powerful forces, but they can be balanced. This protocol is built to calm the body’s stress loop and steady her follicles as they move from early regrowth toward full recovery. Deeper, anchored sleep and a gentler nervous system will become her stabilizers, while iron, protein, and omega‑3 nourishment rebuild the growth foundation. Each week’s focus gives tangible control even while the bigger triggers unwind, turning steady habits into visible strength. ✨

Small daily wins now grow into lasting regrowth and confidence.
